---
name: Feature request · 功能建议
about: Propose a capability or change · 提议一个能力或改动
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
This project is largely maintained by AI assistants that cold-start with no memory of
prior conversations. A self-contained request — background + acceptance + files touched —
lets the assistant align without reading the whole repo. Please fill in all three.

Note: direction and value judgments (whether to build it, privacy/scope trade-offs) are
the author's call. This template gathers context; it doesn't pre-commit the decision.

本项目主要由 AI 协作维护，AI 会话冷启动、没有上次对话的记忆。一个自包含的建议
（背景 + 验收 + 涉及文件）能让 AI 不通读全仓就对齐。请把三块都填上。

注意：方向与价值判断（要不要做、隐私/范围的取舍）归作者拍板。本模板只收集背景，
不预先替决策定案。
-->

## Background · 背景

<!-- What problem does this solve, or what capability do you want, and why.
     要解决什么问题 / 想加什么能力，为什么。 -->

## Acceptance · 验收标准

<!-- What would "done" look like? Prefer something verifiable
     (e.g. "new X export, testbench Y panel shows Z").
     怎么算做完？尽量可验证（比如「新增 X 导出，测试台 Y 面板能看到 Z」）。 -->

## Files / scope (if known) · 涉及文件 / 范围（若已知）

<!-- Known files or an entry point. Flag if it might touch the core
     (three-layer model / cognitive discipline / confidence algorithm) —
     those need the author to weigh in first.
     已知会碰的文件或入口。若可能触及核心（三层模型 / 认知纪律 / 置信度算法）请标出，
     这类需作者先拍板。 -->
